title: PDF Viewer pdf.js canvas stack (dbg81)
description:
PipeSync PDF Viewer now renders pages with pdf.js canvas (Okular-style vertical stack) instead of nested browser PDF iframes. Map workspace is unchanged — native iframes, highlights, structure nodes, and export alignment stay on the existing path.

Viewer paints at 600 DPI base and re-rasterizes on zoom (effective DPI scales with zoom up to 24k) so microscope letter-level zoom stays sharp. Hard-refresh PipeSync (dbg81).

Who is affected: private OVH server users on PDF Viewer workspace.
changeLog: PDF Viewer: pdf.js canvas pages in one scroll column (no iframe mini scrollbars).
Map workspace unchanged — native PDF iframes + highlight/export coords preserved.
Viewer: 600 DPI base render, full quality on first paint (no 120 DPI preview blur).
Zoom re-rasterizes viewer canvases at min(24000, 600 × zoom) effective DPI.
Highlight layout mode for viewer pages: contain (matches canvas paint).
